mapper.select: SELECT suptitle, ip.title, ip.link, t.icon FROM chaos_admin ia LEFT JOIN chaos_admin_role iar ON ia.mu = iar.admin_mu LEFT JOIN chaos_role ir ON iar.role_mu = ir.mu LEFT JOIN chaos_role_permission irp ON irp.role_mu = ir.mu LEFT JOIN ( SELECT mu, supmu, title, link FROM chaos_permission WHERE is_delete=0 AND isroot = 0 ) ip ON ip.mu = irp.permission_mu LEFT JOIN ( SELECT mu, title suptitle, icon FROM chaos_permission WHERE is_delete=0 AND isroot = 1 ) t ON ip.supmu = t.mu WHERE ia.is_delete=0 AND iar.is_delete=0 AND ir.is_delete=0 AND irp.is_delete=0 AND ia.mu = #{mu}
